Services

Intelligent QA for Every Layer

From AI-powered automation to specialized healthcare testing, Qignite provides end-to-end quality engineering solutions that scale with your product.

What We Offer

Built for Real-World Production

Every Qignite service is designed to slot into your existing workflow and deliver measurable quality improvements from day one.

Core Service

AI-Powered QA Automation

Leverage intelligent testing systems that learn, adapt, and evolve with your codebase — dramatically reducing manual effort while increasing coverage and accuracy.

  • Self-healing test scripts
  • Intelligent bug pattern recognition
  • Automated regression suites
  • Visual regression testing
  • AI-generated test cases
Specialized

Healthcare Platform QA

Specialized quality assurance for healthcare systems and digital pathology platforms, ensuring compliance, reliability, and patient data integrity across international markets.

  • HIPAA compliance validation
  • Digital pathology platform testing
  • EHR system integration testing
  • Clinical workflow validation
  • Regulatory compliance checks
AI Service

AI-Assisted Customer Support

Deploy intelligent support agents that resolve issues faster, reduce ticket volume, and deliver consistent, accurate responses — available around the clock.

  • LLM-powered support bots
  • Intelligent ticket routing
  • Knowledge base automation
  • Multi-channel support integration
  • Sentiment analysis & escalation
Enterprise

Enterprise QA Engineering

End-to-end quality engineering for enterprise platforms. From strategy to execution, we embed quality into every phase of your software development lifecycle.

  • QA strategy & process design
  • CI/CD pipeline integration
  • Performance & load testing
  • Security & penetration testing
  • QA team augmentation
Process

How We Work

A structured, transparent approach from first conversation to continuous quality monitoring.

01

Discovery and Audit

We analyze your current QA setup, identify gaps, and map out an AI-enhanced strategy tailored to your stack and goals.

02

Strategy and Design

We architect the right testing framework, selecting tools, automation layers, and AI components for your specific use case.

03

Build and Integrate

We implement automated test suites, CI/CD integration, and AI-powered analysis, embedded directly into your workflow.

04

Monitor and Optimize

Continuous monitoring, intelligent reporting, and iterative improvement to keep your quality standards rising over time.

Industries

Who We Serve

Qignite serves healthcare organizations, digital pathology platforms, and enterprise software companies operating in international markets.

🏥

Healthcare Systems

EHRs, patient portals, clinical decision tools

🔬

Digital Pathology
